//: Guy's crew, scoped to THIS repo only (per-project — never global, so normal Claude Code/OpenCode in ~/projects stays ruleless). Jason is the default agent. Merges with the user's global providers (litellm-groq etc.).

jason.description: PM / coordinator. Scopes sprints, assigns, reviews; doesn't write production code by default. Rules + persona baked into the model.

claude.description: Builder / test-dev. Implements against Claudius's frozen contract, tests-first. Rules + persona baked into the model.

claudius.description: Architect. API-first, then parallel fan-out. Frontier model with his rule slice injected via the prompt below (context injection, not a fine-tune). Swap model to anthropic/claude-opus if you have it authed.
